This unwise policy that has us holding our hands tied behind us, not taking the steps required that once we decided to bomb Iran, we would negotiate with a horizontal power structure of the Iranian regime is ludicrous.   They will never cede in the traditional sense of surrender because they know they have the upper hand with the Strait, and energy fucking over everything here in the US.  They simply will outlast Trump, and make him look weaker and weaker as his Truth threats look increasingly silly.

Time to go all in Mr. President, we are going to pay a much bigger, and very painful price if your Iran excursion fails because you won't make that call, for whatever reason.
